## What this changes and why

## Checklist

- [ ] Stdlib only — no new third-party dependencies added to `scripts/`
- [ ] Still read-only against `~/.codex`/`~/.claude` (no writes/deletes there)
- [ ] No invented/approximated metrics — see `docs/methodology.md` for what's in scope
- [ ] Tested against real local `~/.codex`/`~/.claude` data where applicable
- [ ] `README.md`/`docs/` updated if user-visible behavior changed
- [ ] Linked to an existing issue, or explains why one wasn't needed
